methodology.faithfulness: Heuristic: citation presence + attorney disclaimer + legal structure check. Production: RAGAS G-Eval
methodology.latency: Wall-clock time from query submission to first complete token
methodology.task_success: Binary: answer > 50 chars AND no API error AND legal structure present
